results.title: Inboxes remove _sections and _components folders
results.content: Completed cleanup after UI migration: renamed inboxes/_components to inboxes/components, deleted inboxes/_sections, updated ui imports in InboxWorkspace, InboxListPanel, ConversationMetaSection, ConversationPanelSection, and updated docs/features/inboxes-ui-structure.md with phase 6. Verified no _sections/_components references remain under inboxes and modified files have no diagnostics.

results.title: Docs cleanup and dynamic skill retrieval plan
results.content: Cleaned the core docs so README, docs/GUIDE.md, docs/cli.md, and the coder-cli skill now reflect the current command surface from cmd/coder/main.go and explicitly label roadmap-only commands as future design. Added docs/dynamic_skill_retrieval_plan.md proposing a phased upgrade: structured skill output for LLMs, a server-side skill resolver, session-scoped active skills, re-resolve triggers during work, and context budgeting so agents can fetch and swap skills mid-task instead of locking retrieval at submit time.

results.title: OMS API architecture docs scaffold
results.content: Created documentation set under docs/: README index, ARCHITECTURE.md, API_REFERENCE.md, DATABASE_AND_MIGRATIONS.md and linked all from root README. Docs describe clean architecture layers, module structure, runtime wiring, endpoint inventory, and migration conventions for users/roles/permissions/organizations.

results.title: Committed UI polish and services payload alignment
results.content: Created commit 3732e40 (refactor: polish shared UI and align services payload). The batch includes shared UI cleanup in public/home and shared UI primitives plus a service contract fix removing unsupported description from service create/update payload and editor form. This is the safe checkpoint before continuing further Phase 03 services work.

results.title: InboxSidebarProvider readability refactor
results.content: Improved readability without behavior changes by extracting helper utilities (mergeInboxWithRealtimeTimestamp, upsertAndSortInboxes), reducing duplicated state update logic in socket/detail/update handlers, and introducing completeCurrentDetailInboxRequest to centralize queue cleanup flow. File: src/app/[locale]/(company)/company/[companyId]/inboxes/providers/InboxSidebarProvider.tsx
